name: Sky Blue Credit
description_short: Sky Blue Credit is a credit repair service founded in 1989 that disputes inaccuracies on credit reports using a 45-day dispute cycle, with plans starting at $79/month.
description_long: Sky Blue Credit has operated since 1989 and positions itself as a credit repair company specializing in identifying and disputing errors on consumer credit reports across all three bureaus. The company emphasizes speed and simplicity in its service model, claiming an industry-leading 45-day dispute cycle and a straightforward three-tier pricing structure with no hidden upgrades or add-ons required. Their service range includes credit report analysis, dispute filing, score tracking, creditor interventions, debt validation letters, cease-and-desist letters, goodwill letter assistance, and credit rebuilding support through new account opening help. The company differentiates itself through what it calls "Pro Analysis"—claiming to identify subtle disputes others may miss—combined with flat-rate pricing where all tiers include access to coaches-on-call for one-on-one consultations and a 24/7 client portal. Sky Blue Credit backs its service with a 90-day refund guarantee, a 6-day free trial period, and flexible membership management allowing customers to pause, resume, or select custom billing dates. The company also provides educational content on credit recovery, debt validation, and credit management. While the website presents strong marketing claims and customer testimonials, the core business model remains consistent with standard credit repair: disputing potentially inaccurate items on credit reports to potentially improve credit scores. As with all credit repair services, results depend on the legitimacy of disputes and vary by individual circumstances.
address: 5401 Broken Sound Blvd NW #202, Boca Raton, FL 33487

company_info.headquarters: 5401 Broken Sound Blvd NW #202, Boca Raton, FL 33487

pros: Fast 45-day dispute cycle claimed to be among the industry's fastest
No tier upgrades required; all features included in single monthly payment across all pricing tiers
Coaches-on-Call available for personalized one-on-one consultations without additional fees
Comprehensive service package including debt validation, goodwill letters, and cease-and-desist letters in Premium tier
90-day refund guarantee and 6-day free trial with no charge
Flexible membership management with ability to pause, resume, and select custom billing dates
Three-bureau credit report access and score tracking included in all tiers
Credit rebuilding assistance including new account opening help
cons: No transparent explanation of dispute methodology or success rates on website
Monthly commitment required ($79-$179); no one-time service option mentioned
Claims about dispute effectiveness ('even the most subtle disputes') are marketing language without substantiation
Premium tier at $119/month requires significant long-term cost if disputes take many cycles
Website does not disclose typical timeline to see score improvements or address legal limitations of credit repair
best_for: Consumers with multiple errors or negative items across credit reports seeking ongoing dispute assistance
Couples needing joint credit repair with dedicated support and bundled pricing
Individuals willing to pay monthly fees in exchange for hands-off dispute management and personal coaching
diagnosis: Sky Blue Credit is best suited for consumers with legitimate errors on credit reports who prefer to outsource dispute management entirely and can afford recurring monthly payments ($79-$179). The primary caveat is that credit repair outcomes depend on the validity of disputes filed, and results are never guaranteed; the company's marketing claims about identifying 'subtle' disputes lack third-party verification.
services: Three-bureau credit report and score analysis
Credit bureau dispute filing and re-dispute cycles
Credit rebuilding and new account opening assistance
Statute of Limitation research for collections accounts
